# Incrementality and Lift Measurement

The question is not "did someone click?"

The question is:

```text
What happened because of the campaign that would not have happened otherwise?
```

## Measurement methods

| Method | Use |
|---|---|
| Platform split test | Creative, targeting, bidding, landing page changes. |
| Conversion lift | Causal impact on conversions. |
| Geo holdout | Regional campaigns, offline or broader channels. |
| User holdout | Retargeting, email, lifecycle campaigns. |
| Matched-market test | Larger brand/performance changes. |
| MMM | Broad media mix over longer periods. |
| Last-click attribution | Operational debugging only, not causal truth. |

High ROAS can be fake when ads capture people who would have bought anyway.
